metadata.title: Islamic Institutions Account | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: The Meezan Islamic Institution Deposit Account (MIIDA) is a unique product, tailored exclusively for Islamic Financial Institutions (IFIs). With MIIDA, any IFI now has the opportunity to manage excess liquidity in an immediate and profitable manner by maintaining a checking account with Meezan Bank.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login اردو Islamic Institutions Account Exclusively for Islamic Financial Institutions Open an Islamic Institution Account If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print Tailored exclusively Islamic Financial Institutions (IFIs) The Meezan Islamic Institution Deposit Account (MIIDA) is a unique product, tailored Islamic Financial Institutions (IFIs). With MIIDA, any IFI now has the opportunity to manage excess liquidity in an immediate and profitable manner by maintaining a checking account with Meezan Bank. Account (MIIDA) is Islamic Financial Institutions only. Key Features Minimium Investment Minimum investment amount- PKR 10,000,000/- or multiples thereof Withdrawals 24 hrs. notice for PKR 50 - 200M deposit 48 hrs. notice for 200M+ deposit Mudarabah Agreement Deposits invested under a Mudarabah arrangement IFIs A Checking Account only available for IFIs. Profit Calculation Profit will be calculated on daily product basis Profit Payment Profit will be paid on monthly basis How the MIIDA Account Works Download Fatwa MIIDA works on the principle of Mudarabah under which the customer is an Investor (Rab-ul-Maal), and the Bank is the Manager (Mudarib) of the funds deposited by the customer. The Bank allocates the funds received from the customers to a Deposit pool. Funds in the pool are invested under Islamic modes of finance that include but are not restricted to Murabaha, Sukuk and Ijarah. Profit Sharing Ratio Bank will share 50% of Gross Income as Mudarib Depositor Gross Income as Rab-ul-Maal Weightages for the Month of April 2026 Products Tier Groups Weightage Assigned MIIDA Re.1 - 499.99 M 0.20 MIIDA 500 M & Above 0.20 MIIDA NBFI - 499.99 M 0.53 MIIDA NBFI M & Above 0.53 Consolidated Weightages Profit Rates Profit Rates the Month of February 2026 Products Amount Profit - 499.99 M 2.52% M & Above 2.52% - 499.99 M 6.34% M & Above 6.34% Profit Rates Historical Profit Rates How to Apply for a Institution Deposit Account Download, Print, Fill Form PDF version of our printed Account Opening Form is also available for download. You can print the form, fill your details and submit it along with the required documents at your preferred branch. Download Form Visit a Branch You may visit any branch of Meezan Bank and our staff will assist you in filling the Account Opening Form and opening your account. Locate a Branch Form submitted successfully Thank you for contacting us! Our representative will call you within 2 working days. Do you have another query? Feel free to re-fill the form and submit it again Open your Islamic Institution Account Now! Fill out the form below and you'll be guided about how you can open your new account. MeezanGPT Assalam o Alaikum! How can I be of service to you today? By using this AI assistant, you acknowledge and agree that... read more Copy link ✓ Thanks for sharing!
